description_long: This hardware store is a multi-story commercial building with a light gray facade and a dark, gabled tiled roof. The front features large display windows and two main entrances, framed with muted red trim, suggesting retail access and product visibility. The upper floors have rows of symmetrically arranged white-framed windows, indicating office or storage space above the retail area. The building has a stepped structure, with a lower section extending to one side, likely for additional retail or storage use. The rear and side walls are plain, with minimal detailing and no visible windows or doors. The overall appearance is clean and functional, with a subtle, traditional architectural style suited for an urban streetscape.
description: A multi-story hardware store with large front display windows, muted red trim, and a dark tiled roof, featuring a stepped, traditional facade.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the hardware store are visible, showing large display windows, two entrances, and rows of white-framed windows above.
description_view_1: The right front corner is shown, highlighting the main entrance, display windows, and the stepped roofline.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is visible, featuring a plain, windowless wall with minimal architectural detail.
description_view_3: The back and right side are shown, revealing the stepped structure and additional windows on the side, with the lower extension clearly visible.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features two main entrances and large display windows spanning the ground floor, framed by muted red trim. The upper floors have evenly spaced windows, and the facade is stepped with a lower extension to one side.
